task_completion.description: Verify that the new company 'Aura Health' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Aura Health' listed in the Companies view or a success message indicating the company was created.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Consumer Wearables' department's company has been updated to 'Aura Health'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Departments list or the 'Consumer Wearables' department details page to see the Company field set to 'Aura Health'.

task_completion.description: Verify that users assigned to the 'Consumer Wearables' department have been updated to the new company.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Users list. Users belonging to the 'Consumer Wearables' department should now show 'Aura Health' in their Company column.

task_completion.description: Verify that hardware assets checked out to the 'Consumer Wearables' users have been updated to the new company.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Hardware/Assets list. Assets that are checked out to users in the 'Consumer Wearables' department should show 'Aura Health' as their Company.

task_completion.description: Verify that unassigned assets with 'Wearable' in their name have been updated to the new company.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Hardware/Assets list. Assets with 'Wearable' in their name that are not checked out (Ready to Deploy/Unassigned) should show 'Aura Health' as their Company.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web-based IT Asset Management GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the ITAM application interface, not a terminal, script editor, or direct database client.

integrity.description: Verify that the control department ('Enterprise Health') and its users were not modified.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Enterprise Health' department and its users should NOT have 'Aura Health' listed as their company.

integrity.description: Verify that unassigned assets without 'Wearable' in the name were not modified.
integrity.visual_evidence: Unassigned assets that do not contain the word 'Wearable' should NOT have 'Aura Health' listed as their company.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target new company to create: 'Aura Health'. Target department to migrate: 'Consumer Wearables'. Target asset keyword for unassigned assets: 'Wearable'. Control department that MUST NOT be modified: 'Enterprise Health'.
